title: kaori.pipeline.bronze.complete
description: Fired after Bronze parsing finishes (rows landed in bronze_rows). Producer: services/data-pipeline/bronze/ingestor.py:219.

row_count.description: Total bronze_rows inserted across all sheets.

detected_lang.description: Primary detected language (e.g. 'vi', 'en') used for column-mapping LLM prompts.

sheet_count.description: Number of sheets parsed from the file.

workflow_id.description: Set when the upload is attached to a workflow step (X-Workflow-Step-ID was supplied). UUID string. Gap 4 — used by ai-orchestrator KPI handler to attribute the compute run to a workflow.

workflow_step_id.description: workflow_nodes.node_id — set together with workflow_id. UUID string.

department_id.description: Department the workflow belongs to. UUID string. KPI handler looks up dept_type from this and fans out to every active KPI for that dept_type.

branch_id.description: Optional — set when the workflow attaches to a specific branch (subsidiary). UUID string.

uploaded_by.description: User who triggered the upload. UUID string. Audit trail only.
